potential_missing.source_sentence: In order to avoid a situation like this and to retain all the firm’s clients and to attract new ones, a refreshing website is needed.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall display a list of the firm's major projects on the website.
The system shall provide a brief overview of all available departments and collaborations on the website.
The system shall display recent news related to the firm on the website.
The system shall provide access to the firm's insights on the website.
The system shall include a section detailing the history of the firm on the website.
The system shall provide a mail or chat feature for user interaction on the website.
The system shall display information about career opportunities related to the firm on the website.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The competitors have a modern, well-built website that is pulling some of the firm’s clients towards themselves.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall ensure that the firm's website is not outdated and does not lose clients to competitors.
The system shall provide a modern and visually appealing design for the firm's website.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall display information about career opportunities related to the firm on the website.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not explicitly mentioned in the source text, but it can be inferred from the context. However, the exact wording and scope of this requirement are not clearly defined.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall display a list of the firm's major projects on the website.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall include the major projects of the firm, ...
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are similar and can be combined into one requirement.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall provide a mail or chat feature for user interaction on the website.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous because it does not specify whether the mail or chat feature should be integrated with an existing email service or if it should be a standalone feature.
